svg.title: Value flow
svg.desc: Value flow: four coding agents connect over MCP to the Octopus Blackboard which records and exposes but never orchestrates, producing a conflict-aware kanban, AI attribution, a CI review gate, and a tamper-evident audit trail.

text.font-family: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: One shared blackboard turns blind agents into an accountable team

text.font-family: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Four coding agents editing one repo — otherwise blind to each other
